ref: That night, Abram divided up his troops, attacked from all sides, and won a great victory. But some of the enemy escaped to the town of Hobah north of Damascus,
text: Na ɔno nye no nkowaa kyɛɛ hɔnho mu kɔr hɔn do anafua, na wɔbɔɔ hɔn gui, na wotsiiw hɔn kodur Hoba a ɔwɔ Damaskɔs n’abankum no.
translated: And he was with them for three months, and they preached, and he spoke boldly in the name of the Lord Jesus, and he disputed against the Hellenists, but they attempted to kill him, and when the brethren found out, they brought him down to Caesarea and sent him to Tarsus, then he went to Damascus to the high priest

ref: Then Isaac said, “Son, come over here and kiss me.”
text: Na n’egya Isaak see no dɛ, Afei pin ha, na bɛfew m’ano, me ba.
translated: When I went to Isaac's house, then I asked him, and he told me, come.

ref: Let me go through your flocks and herds and take the sheep and goats that are either spotted or speckled and the black lambs. That's all you need to give me.
text: Ndɛ mebɛfa wo nguan nyinara mu, na meyiyi nguan a hɔn ho yɛ woranworan nye ntokowa ntokowa nyinara, na nguan etuntum a wɔwɔ nguantsen no mu nyinara, nye mpɔnkye no dza hɔn ho yɛ ntokowa ntokowa nye woranworan no efi mu: na hɔn a wɔtse dɛm no na ɔnyɛ m’apaabɔdze.
translated: And when I come to you and find your faith and that of those who are with you, and your love and that of those who are with you, and the steadfastness of your faith, and the love that you have towards those who are with you, then I will not be ashamed of you.

ref: She was having a rough time, but the woman who was helping her said, “Don't worry! It's a boy.”
text: Na ɔbaa dɛ aber a n’awoo no mu yɛɛ dzen no, nna awogyefo no see no dɛ, Mma nnsuro; ibenya babanyin kor so afei.
translated: When the woman had finished speaking, the fetish priest said to her, 'Be calm; your child will come back to you someday.'

ref: I will bless her, and you will have a son by her. She will become the mother of nations, and some of her descendants will even be kings.
text: Na mibehyira no, ekyir yi so mebɛma enye no awo babanyin: nyew, mibehyira no, na ɔbɛyɛ amanaman hɔn na; aman ahemfo befi no mu epue.
translated: And when I come, this throne will be given to him as a gift: indeed, when I come, he will be the ruler of the nations and; the kings of the world will bow down to him.
